briefdescription.para: Id of Chem compartment used to figure out volumes of voxels.
Flag: True when solver setup has been completed.

detaileddescription.para: Stoich is the class that sets up the reaction system and manages the stoichiometry matrix

Gets block of data. The first 4 entries are passed in on the 'values' vector: the start voxel, numVoxels, start pool#, numPools. These are followed by numVoxels * numPools of data values which are filled in by the function. We assert that the entire requested block is present in this KsolveBase. The block is organized as an array of arrays of voxels; values[pool#][voxel#]
Note that numVoxels and numPools are the number in the current block, not the upper limit of the block. So values.size() == 4 + numPools * numVoxels.

briefdescription.para: get initial conc of molecules in given pool and voxel. Bdry cond.
Diffusion constant: Only one per pool, voxel number is ignored.

detaileddescription.para: Motor constant: Only one per pool, voxel number is ignored. Used only in Dsolves, so here I put in a dummy.

briefdescription.para: Get # of molecules in given pool and voxel. Varies with time.
Number of voxels here. pools_.size() == getNumLocalVoxels.
gets number of pools (species) handled by system.
Return pool index, using Stoich ptr to do lookup.

detaileddescription.para: Get rate const in a given reac and voxel. Usually fixed but may vary if the reac is controlled by a function.

briefdescription.para: Return volume of pool e.
Return a pointer to the specified VoxelPool.

detaileddescription.para: Sets block of data. The first 4 entries on the 'values' vector are the start voxel, numVoxels, start pool#, numPools. These are followed by numVoxels * numPools of data values.

briefdescription.para: Assigns compartment.
Set initial conc of molecules in given pool and voxel. Bdry cond.
Diffusion constant: Only one per pool, voxel number is ignored.
Assigns the diffusion solver. Used by the reac solvers.
Set buffer status of pool. Changes class between Pool and BufPool.
Set # of molecules in given pool and voxel. Varies with time.
Assign number of voxels (size of pools_ vector )
Specifies number of pools (species) handled by system.
Specifies number of var pools and total pools including buffered .
Used to tell Dsolver to assign 'prev' values.

detaileddescription.para: Informs the ZPI about the stoich, used during subsequent computations. Called to wrap up the model building. The Stoich does this call after it has set up its own path.

briefdescription.para: Used for telling Dsolver to handle all ops across Junctions.

detaileddescription.para: Informs the solver that the rate terms or volumes have changed and that the parameters must be updated. The index specifies which rateTerm to change, and if it is ~0U it means update all of them.

briefdescription.para: Return volume of voxel i.

detaileddescription.para: This pure virtual base class is for solvers that want to talk to pools. The Eref specifies both the pool identity and the voxel number within the pool.
